title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sunteck Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
